claims.verification_method: Generated from the 8-column bibliography table and cross-checked against publications.html.
claims.caveat: Curated count includes papers, books, presentations, courses, playbooks, and series.

claims.claim: The repository contains 108 per-paper documentation folders.
claims.verification_method: Folder inventory and paper metadata count.
claims.caveat: Not every bibliography row has a paper folder; media/course rows may not.

claims.claim: The docxology GitHub profile has 286 public repositories.
claims.verification_method: GitHub REST API user profile response.
claims.caveat: GitHub profile count includes forks and repositories not catalogued in SOFTWARE.md.

claims.claim: The Active Inference Institute GitHub organization has 50 public repositories.
claims.verification_method: GitHub REST API organization profile response.
claims.caveat: Local software catalog tracks 32 AII repositories with docxology contributions.

claims.claim: ORCID 0000-0001-6232-9096 is the canonical researcher identifier.
claims.verification_method: ORCID profile and public works endpoint.
claims.caveat: ORCID public work groups may lag new deposits and may group versions differently.

claims.claim: Curio Cards 24, 25, and 26 are early Ethereum art NFTs minted on May 9, 2017.
claims.verification_method: Curio Cards artist profile, Christie's lot page, and local paper notes.
claims.caveat: Use conservative phrasing; broader first/earliest claims vary by source and definition.

claims.claim: Google Scholar citation count is manually synced as 812 citations with h-index 15.
claims.verification_method: Manual Google Scholar profile sync; public cache and access path can vary.
claims.caveat: Do not overwrite automatically from cached or anonymous Scholar views.

claims.claim: Daniel Ari Friedman earned a PhD at Stanford University with dissertation record pb813wm1484.
claims.verification_method: Stanford PURL dissertation record and local paper folder.
claims.caveat: Use the Stanford PURL as the public institutional source.

claims.claim: Daniel Ari Friedman was an NSF Postdoctoral Fellow at UC Davis from 2020 to 2023.
claims.caveat: Add a grant or institutional source if a public authoritative record is located.

claims.claim: Active Inference Institute officers list Daniel Friedman as President and Treasurer.
claims.verification_method: AII officers page and local discovery map.
claims.caveat: Officer roles are time-sensitive and should be rechecked before formal bios.

claims.claim: The Active Inference Institute board page lists 10 current directors.
claims.verification_method: AII board page and local governance notes.
claims.caveat: Board membership is time-sensitive; retain access dates in narrative pages.

claims.claim: The Active Inference Institute announced a 33-member Scientific Advisory Board cohort in 2026.
claims.verification_method: AII SAB page and local discovery notes.
claims.caveat: Use cautious wording unless the source page explicitly states the cohort count.

claims.claim: AII Textbook Group copy references 10 cohorts through 2026.
claims.verification_method: Curated site copy and AII program page.
claims.caveat: Program pages may use different public summary counts; keep local copy aligned with preferred site wording.

claims.claim: Homepage teaching copy lists BIOL-1 at Pelican Bay and BIOL-8 Human Biology for Spring 2026.
claims.caveat: Term-specific teaching claims should be updated after each semester.

claims.claim: COGSEC.org is the cognitive security publication and research context linked from the profile.
claims.verification_method: Public site link and curated profile copy.
claims.caveat: Prefer COGSEC pages for COGSEC-specific publication claims.
